name: Curried Shrimp Phyllo Bundles
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Coconut, finely grated or shredded
1/2 tsp Grated gingerroot (or 1/4 tsp ground ginger)
4 oz Can tiny shrimp, drained and peeled
6 Sheets frozen phyllo dough (16 x 12 inches), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, stir together yogurt, coconut, peanuts, chutney, curry powder, and gingerroot.
2. Gently stir in shrimp until combined.
3. Unfold phyllo dough on a waxed-paper-lined cutting board. Cover remaining sheets with a damp paper towel or cloth to prevent drying.
4. Generously brush one sheet of phyllo with some margarine or butter. Place another sheet over it and brush again.
5. Repeat with a third sheet of phyllo, brushing each layer with margarine or butter.
6. Using a sharp knife, cut the stack into twelve 4-inch squares.
7. Place about 2 teaspoons of filling in the center of each square. Fold the four corners together and twist slightly to seal.
8. Repeat with remaining phyllo dough, margarine or butter, and filling to make 24 bundles total.
9. Arrange bundles on an ungreased parchment- or foil-lined baking sheet.
10. Bake, uncovered, in a 375 degree F oven for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden. Serve immediately.
Makes 24 bundles.
To freeze: Prepare phyllo bundles as directed, except do not bake. Freeze the unbaked bundles on a baking sheet. Transfer to a storage container; seal, label, and place in the freezer. To serve, place frozen bundles on a parchment- or foil-lined baking sheet. Bake, uncovered, in a 375 degree F oven for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden.
